content.text: I dreamed of a door made of starlight. When I touched it, my hand became transparent.
content.raw_input: I dreamed of a door made of starlight. When I touched it, my hand became transparent.

content.text: A symbol appeared: three circles interlocking, rotating slowly. It felt like a warning and an invitation.
content.raw_input: A symbol appeared: three circles interlocking, rotating slowly. It felt like a warning and an invitation.

content.text: The Raven Room is a vast library carved into obsidian cliff-face, open to a storm-lit sky. A raven with silver eyes perches on a spiral staircase. The room holds three levels: the Map Floor (star charts and navigation instruments), the Archive (scrolls of forgotten names), and the Roost (where the raven sleeps among crystals that hum with old frequencies). The raven speaks in riddles and trades answers for stories.

The Elephant Door Oasis: nighttime beach under a mind-controlled moon. Shelby is always present with black horns, fae energy. Five elephants — dad, mom, and babies Peace, Serenity, and Joy. Air carries jasmine and lavender. Castle visible on the cliff. Water reflects whatever you focus on. Three inner doors: Reflecting Water, Conversation with Elephants, Castle Door.
